title: Frank and Frank (or the Valley and the Walrus: Ruminations on the Mystery from Soup to Nuts)
original_title: Frank and Frank (or The Valley and The Walrus: Ruminations on the Mystery from Soup to Nuts)
overview: Deep in a midlife crisis Frank, a faith and financial influencer on the edge of divorce, finds himself befriending Frank, a happily separated carpenter and artist who enjoys life. As their friendship grows and the two men start sharing stories Frank #1 has to face up to his uncertain future…
